user.title: Samsung Soundbar Local
user.description: Set up your Samsung soundbar for local control.

menu_options.sources: Configure input sources (rename, hide, or reorder)
menu_options.sound_modes: Configure sound modes (rename, hide, or reorder)

sources.title: Input Sources
sources.description:
Set a display name for each input. Clear a field to hide that source.
Use the order field to control the order (comma-separated API names). Remove an entry from the order to hide it.

sound_modes.title: Sound Modes
sound_modes.description:
Set a display name for each sound mode. Clear a field to hide that mode.
Use the order field to control the order (comma-separated API names). Remove an entry from the order to hide it.
